spk_a.transcript: 包括你的什么恩师, 什么靠山, 什么同党，是英雄好汉都站出来。

spk_b.transcript: 臣不是英雄好汉，臣也没有同党。

qa_result.question: What is the emotion of the speaker (<the first speaker>) who utters the line "包括你的什么恩师, 什么靠山, 什么同党，是英雄好汉都站出来。" in the audio when delivering that content? What impact does this emotion exert on other participants in the conversation?
options: A. The emotion is anger/discontent, which makes <the second speaker> hurriedly state that he has no private faction, and all his promotions come from superiors to prove his innocence
B. The emotion is anger/discontent, which makes <the third speaker> hurriedly state that he has no private faction, and all his promotions come from superiors to prove his innocence
C. The emotion is calm/neutral, which makes all officials present fall into collective silence immediately and dare not speak
D. Cannot be determined (the evidence is insufficient to draw a unique conclusion)
qa_result.answer_text: The emotion is anger/discontent, which makes <the second speaker> hurriedly state that he has no private faction, and all his promotions come from superiors to prove his innocence
